---
title: "Chisato Ruike"
page-layout: full
---

<div class="container-fluid content">
<div class="row">
<div class="col-12">
<img src="../images/header.jpg" class="header-image" alt="Header image">
</div>
</div>

<div class="row">
<div class="col-md-4 text-center">
<div class="profile-container">
<img src="../images/profile.jpg" class="img-fluid rounded-circle mb-3" style="max-width: 40%;" alt="Profile photo">
<div class="profile-name">Chisato Ruike</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="col-md-8">
<p class="lead mt-4">
I am a graduate student at the Nuclear Theory Laboratory, University of Tsukuba, primarily researching nuclear structure.
</p>

<div class="card mt-4 mb-4">
<div class="card-header">
News
</div>
<div class="card-body">
<ul>
<li>May 2025: Website launched.</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>

<h2>Research</h2>

<div class="publication">
<h3>Nuclear Superfluidity Research</h3>
<p>I study the structure of superfluid nuclei with pairing correlations, mainly using density functional theory from the perspective of collective motion.</p>
</div>

<div class="row mt-5">
<div class="col-md-12 text-center">
<a href="profile.html" class="btn btn-primary">View Profile</a>
<a href="papers.html" class="btn btn-primary mx-2">Papers</a>
<a href="presentations.html" class="btn btn-primary mx-2">Presentations</a>
<a href="awards.html" class="btn btn-primary mx-2">Awards</a>
<a href="contact.html" class="btn btn-primary">Contact</a>
</div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>
